positive: A symmetrical, stylized celestial forest scene. Glowing crystalline flora and bioluminescent mushrooms sprout from the roots of ancient, gnarled trees. The forest floor is covered in swirling nebulae patterns and gentle, phosphorescent mist. Two majestic, stylized cosmic fox spirits sit alertly in the center, facing forward. Composition should be highly detailed and balanced, emphasizing strong contrast between deep indigo blues, vibrant emerald greens, and warm cosmic gold accents. Minimalist negative space, ideal for print on clothing. Digital watercolor style, clean linework, ethereal glow, centered focus, symmetry.
